text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's New Year's Day, and Hishi Akebono is on her
way. She said she has something she wants to give
me...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Happy New Year, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's carrying a stack of tiered boxes so high that
they almost reach the ceiling.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Sorry I took so long. I got so absorbed in my work
that I lost track of time!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It's New Year's dishes, mochi soup, and some
regular mochi, too!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Since it's New Year's, I thought it'd be nice to
have a New Year's feast together!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
And while I was wondering what kind of dishes to
make, I figured it'd be best to have everything, so
I made everything!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It's the very first day of the new year, so I wanted
to start it off right!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: So, what would you like to eat first?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Some are traditional New Year's dishes, but I
made more contemporary ones, too! They're full
of meat, so they'll bulk us up for sure!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
The miso soup is still nice and hot, so it'll warm us
right up.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
And then there's the mochi... I made all different
kinds, so I bet it'll be super fun trying them all!
choice_data_list: Let's bulk up with the New Year's dishes!
Let's warm ourselves up with mochi soup!
Let's enjoy the different mochi together!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you want to start with the New Year's dishes?
Okay!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Don't be too surprised, all right? Here it comes!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ta-dah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, she lifts the lids off the boxes one by
one until about seventy percent of them are
open.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Soon, the table is crowded with boxes, each one
packed with gorgeous New Year's dishes. The
servings are unsurprisingly generous.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I wanted us both to be happy and full, so I
worked really hard! ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
These dishes can keep for quite a while, so it's
okay if we don't finish everything today!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Let's dig in right away! Hold on, I'll go get us
some plates. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The volume of food Hishi Akebono has prepared
is daunting, but each of the incredible dishes is
beyond buono!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
You want to start with the mochi soup? Yay!
Ehehe! I'm actually really proud of how buono it
turned out today.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I made it the way they like it in the Kanto area. It
has a soy sauce base with cubes of mochi in there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After her explanation, Hishi Akebono opens the
box in her hands...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I see several bowls of soup, each one brimming
with neatly arranged ingredients.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I cut the carrot pieces into different shapes!
They're shaped like bunnies, kitties, stars, and
you!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yep! ☆ Don't they look just like you?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I made them while picturing your smile. I didn't
even have to use any photos for reference!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The look-alike carrots are a surprise at first, but
the soup's broth and mochi are top-tier and
absolutely delicious.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! Nice choice. There are a bunch of different
mochi, so you can choose whichever kind you
like.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono opens up one of the boxes,
revealing a variety of mochi lined up snugly
inside.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I made mochi blocks, mochi wrapped in red bean
paste, mugwort mochi, mochi with kinako
powder, mochi glazed with sweet soy sauce,
tricolor mochi, and sakura mochi—although I
know it's not quite the season. ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Which one do you want to try? I bet you feel
spoilt for choice!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! How about we share them all, and we can
both have half of each one?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Let me make some tea for us first. I'm just going
to borrow your kettle for a sec!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We end up splitting all the mochi between us, and
every type is tasty in its own way!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Let's make this a good year together, Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I really feel like we've made a great start to the
new year!
